mapper.insert: INSERT INTO "file_cleanup_task" ( "creator_id", "modifier_id", "file_resource_id", "reason", "status", "execute_after" ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{userId}, #{fileResourceId}, #{reason}, 'PENDING', NOW() + (#{delaySeconds} * INTERVAL '1 second') ) ON CONFLICT ("file_resource_id") DO UPDATE SET "reason" = EXCLUDED."reason", "status" = 'PENDING', "execute_after" = CASE WHEN EXCLUDED."reason" = 'USER_REMOVED' THEN LEAST("file_cleanup_task"."execute_after", EXCLUDED."execute_after") ELSE EXCLUDED."execute_after" END, "lease_token" = NULL, "lease_until" = NULL, "last_error" = '' WHERE "file_cleanup_task"."status" != 'RUNNING'
mapper.select: WITH candidates AS ( SELECT "id" FROM "file_cleanup_task" WHERE ("status" = 'PENDING' AND "execute_after" <= NOW()) OR ("status" = 'RUNNING' AND "lease_until" < NOW()) ORDER BY "execute_after", "id" FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED LIMIT #{limit} ) UPDATE "file_cleanup_task" task SET "status" = 'RUNNING', "attempt" = task."attempt" + 1, "lease_token" = #{leaseToken}, "lease_until" = NOW() + (#{leaseSeconds} * INTERVAL '1 second'), "modifier_id" = task."creator_id" FROM candidates WHERE task."id" = candidates."id" RETURNING task."id", task."creator_id", task."modifier_id", task."creation_time", task."modification_time", task."file_resource_id", task."reason", task."status", task."attempt", task."execute_after", task."lease_token", task."lease_until", task."last_error"
mapper.update: UPDATE "file_cleanup_task" SET "status" = 'PENDING', "execute_after" = NOW() + (#{delaySeconds} * INTERVAL '1 second'), "lease_token" = NULL, "lease_until" = NULL, "last_error" = #{lastError} WHERE "id" = #{id} AND "status" = 'RUNNING' AND "lease_token" = #{leaseToken}
UPDATE "file_cleanup_task" SET "status" = 'CANCELLED', "lease_token" = NULL, "lease_until" = NULL WHERE "file_resource_id" = #{fileResourceId} AND "status" IN ('PENDING', 'FAILED', 'CANCELLED')
